name: Perfect Fitness
about: Perfect Fitness is a comprehensive wellness facility that integrates indoor golf simulation with a wide range of fitness and wellness services. The venue features state-of-the-art Trackman golf simulators for virtual play and practice, alongside offerings including fitness classes, personal training, and various massage therapy options. It operates on a mixed pricing model, featuring both a la carte services and memberships such as the $150 'Perfect Wellness' membership, which includes unlimited classes and one monthly massage. The facility is designed for individuals seeking an all-encompassing health and recreational experience, combining technology-driven golf with traditional fitness and recovery services.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Trackman technology provides detailed ball and swing feedback
Ideal for both practice and virtual play on famous courses
Part of a multi-sport facility allowing for varied workout routines
Flexible membership options include access to other wellness amenities

food_and_drink.notes: On-site smoothie and snack bar available
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulators with advanced tracking technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The provided content does not specify whether rental clubs are available. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for club rental options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink to the venue?
faq.answer: An on-site smoothie and snack bar is available. There is no mention of a BYOB policy outside of this, so external food and drink may not be permitted.

faq.answer: The provided content does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes. This information can likely be obtained by contacting the venue directly.
